title: Optimized Vanilla
body:
# **Optimized Vanilla (1.21)**
This modpack is created for the new Version 1.21 and designed, so you can play everything, from PvP to SMP server and Single player worlds.
It mainly adds Performance mods (sodium too) and lots of standart life-making-easier mods like Debug Keybind or Controlling mod.

__________________________________________________________________________________________


<details>
<summary>Modlist</summary>

- AppleSkin
  
- Architectury API
  
- Bobby
  
- BoxLib
  
- Chat heads
- ClothConfig API
- Controlling
- Debug Keybind
- Debugify
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FerriteCore
- Freecam (Modrinth Edition)
- Gamma Utils (Fullbright)
- HD Skins
- Held Item Info
- Indium
- Iris Shaders
- Jade 🔍
- Kirin
- Lithium
- Melody
- MidnightControls
- Mod Menu
- ModernFix
- Modpack Update Checker
- Mouse Tweaks
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Roughly Enough Items (REI)
- Searchables
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- spark
- Text Placeholder API
- Video Tape
- Xaero's Minimap
- Xaero's World Map
- YetAnotherConfigLib
- Zoomify



</details>

_____________________________________________________________________________________________


I also recomend play on my server Creation_SMP.aternos.me (SMP Server - arena and more) with this modpack! Official DC: [https://discord.gg/6BrzCwaB](https://discord.gg/6BrzCwaB)
